data.name: Hentai Achievement Puzzle 2
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Achievement Puzzle 2 is a relaxing puzzle game. It's a slide puzzle game in which you can slide the tiles to complete the pictures.

This game can be as easy or challenging as you want, with 30 levels and a gallery which unlocks at the end ;)

If you aren't in the mood for a challenge and just want to relax, you can automatically solve the puzzles.

FEATURES

  • 30 Unique Beautiful Images!

  • 3 Levels of Difficulty, ranging from easy to hard!

  • Gallery which can be operated with one hand!

  • Relaxing, Original Soundtrack!

  • Achievements!

All characters depicted in this game are over 18.

data.short_description: A relaxing puzzle game with cute anime girls! Hentai Achievement Puzzle 2 has dozens of beautiful puzzles for your pleasure.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel I5 12th Gen
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: RTX 1050
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel i7 12700k
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: RTX 3060
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
